summary: Homepage update to add a selectable passes section with five pass options (name, price/inclusion, and descriptions).
architectural_notes: Homepage includes a passes section where users can select a pass to secure it.

existing_features.title: Update the homepage "Tickets & Passes" UI (in `frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLocationSection.tsx`) to include five additional pass options with the exact names, price/inclusion text, and descriptions specified in the conversation: (1) Content Creator Pass ($4) with a creator/influencer-focused description; (2) Touch Pass (Included with Regular Pass; ask to upgrade) with a description about interactive/touch-allowed elements; (3) Skip the Line Pass ($34) with a description about priority entry; (4) Blackout Pass (Included with ticket) with a description warning guests who are afraid of the dark; (5) Kid Pass ($8) with a description for younger guests/family-friendly access. Keep existing passes already shown unless explicitly removed by the user.

Make the pass options selectable on the homepage Tickets & Passes section, and provide a clear call-to-action to "secure" the selected pass (UI-only). Selection should be obvious and accessible (keyboard navigable), and the CTA must not require implementing payments.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add 5 selectable passes to homepage with name, price/inclusion, and descriptions (Content Creator $4, Touch included w/ regular upgrade, Skip the Line $34, Blackout included w/ ticket warning, Kid $8)

projectName: Add five new selectable passes to homepage Tickets & Passes section
